main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'failure SBS dosing system + non-functional agitator + stratification + under-dosing → free chlorine 0.42 mg/L' literal.

alternatives.justification: 5 alts (fouling, sensor, concentración SBS preparation, pump cavitation).

recommended_action.justification: Stop RO + isolate trains + repair agitator + drain/refill SBS + verify mixing 30 min + verify dosing — match gold.

requested_data.justification: Pide mechanical inspection del agitator motor — match accepted (verificación agitador).

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi: agitador OK + uniform SBS → switch a sensor/pump.
